minimal_context: The student is expected to walk on the treadmill for two minutes during a one-on-one APE session.
dialogue:
TUTOR: It is time to walk on the treadmill for two minutes.

STUDENT: (Uses the break timer to request a break from instruction)

TUTOR: We need to do the treadmill first.

STUDENT: (Requests another break, taking a 5-minute long break)

TUTOR: Your break is over. Please stand up and walk on the treadmill.

STUDENT: (Lays on the floor screaming)

options.A: Responding to the student's actions, utterances, and intentions in a responsive and contingent manner.
options.B: Implementing a 'time-on/time-off' schedule (e.g., 2 minutes of treadmill walking followed by a 1-minute break).
options.C: Helping the student more effectively employ their atypical strategy during the treadmill activity.
options.D: Using facilitative strategies and communication temptations throughout the one-on-one APE session.
